_comment: sap-mcp-server 全ツールの単一正本（Single Source of Truth）。(1) sap-mcp-server/src/index.ts が aiDescription を tool description としてビルド時にバイナリへ焼込。(2) mcp-admin の MCP Tools 画面が summary/overview/auth/callPath/officialUrl/roles を参照（ビルド時に frontend へ同期）。手書き重複（旧 index.ts description / PermissionMatrixPage.js TOOLS）は集約済。aiDescription=AI向け全文 / summary=一覧短文 / overview=モーダル機能概要 / auth=認証方式 / callPath=呼出path例 / officialUrl=公式リファレンス / roles=full(mcp)/ro(mcp_readonly) 差。

summary.ja: 接続(Destination)一覧

overview.ja: BTP サブアカウントの Destination を一覧。Description から用途(DEV/QAS/PRD)を識別する。
overview.en: List Destinations in the BTP subaccount; identify usage (DEV/QAS/PRD) from the Description.

tools.aiDescription: List all Destinations in the BTP subaccount. Useful for identifying usage (DEV/QAS/PRD, etc.) from the Description field.

summary.ja: セッション既定の接続を切替

overview.ja: セッションの既定 Destination を切り替える。以降 destination 省略時に使われる。
overview.en: Switch the session default Destination, used when destination is omitted afterward.

tools.aiDescription: Switch the default Destination for the session. Subsequent sap_call_fm / sap_select_table use it when destination is omitted.

summary.ja: 現在の既定接続を表示

overview.ja: 現在のセッション既定 Destination を表示する。
overview.en: Show the current session-default Destination.

tools.aiDescription: Show the current session-default Destination.

summary.ja: ABAP Function Module 呼出。commit 指定で更新も実行（権限差なし）
summary.en: Call ABAP Function Module (commit can update; same for both roles)

overview.ja: ABAP の Function Module を呼ぶ。commit 指定で更新も実行（参照専用でも開発/品質では更新が起きえる）。
overview.en: Call an ABAP Function Module; commit can perform updates (read-only can still update on DEV/QAS).

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（Basic / PrincipalPropagation）＋ backend REST handler ZCL_STMS_REST_HANDLER
tools.callPath: backend relay /api/tableread/mcp/call-fm → 指定 FM（例 RFC_READ_TABLE 等）
tools.aiDescription: Call an SAP ABAP Function Module via the backend REST handler. Pass {name, value, abaptype} in importing, and {name, value=row type name, rows?=input JSON array string} in tabparams.

summary.ja: SAP テーブル動的 SELECT

overview.ja: RFC_READ_TABLE 相当。ABAP 側で SELECT * し fields はクライアント側フィルタ。
overview.en: Equivalent to RFC_READ_TABLE; ABAP runs SELECT * and fields filters client-side.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（Basic / PrincipalPropagation）＋ backend REST handler
tools.callPath: backend relay /api/tableread/mcp/call-fm 系（テーブル名 + fields + options）
tools.aiDescription: Dynamically SELECT from an SAP table (equivalent to RFC_READ_TABLE). The ABAP side runs SELECT *, and fields is applied as a client-side filter.

summary.ja: ADT で自由形式 SQL 実行

overview.ja: ADT REST の datapreview/freestyle で自由形式 SQL。パラメトリック CDS も読める。
overview.en: Free-form SQL via ADT datapreview/freestyle; can read parameterized CDS views.

tools.aiDescription: Run free-form SQL via the ADT REST API (/sap/bc/adt/datapreview/freestyle). Can read parameterized CDS views (e.g. I_GLAccountLineItemCube( P_DisplayCurrency = '' )). SELECT only (max 4000 chars).

summary.ja: ADT で Open SQL 実行

overview.ja: ADT SQL コンソールで Open SQL。現状 freestyle と同一エンドポイント（互換用）。
overview.en: Open SQL via ADT SQL Console; currently same endpoint as freestyle (compatibility).

tools.aiDescription: Run Open SQL via the ADT SQL Console (currently the same endpoint as sap_adt_freestyle; kept for compatibility).

summary.ja: DDIC オブジェクト(テーブル/CDS)を SELECT *

overview.ja: DDIC オブジェクト(テーブル/CDS ビュー)を WHERE なしで簡易 SELECT *。
overview.en: SELECT * a DDIC object (table / CDS view) without a WHERE clause.

tools.aiDescription: SELECT * a DDIC object (table / CDS view) via ADT REST. Quick inspection without a WHERE clause.

summary.ja: ABAP ソース読取

overview.ja: ADT REST で ABAP ソース読取。program=レポート/プログラム、fm=関数モジュール(グループ要)。
overview.en: Read ABAP source via ADT REST; program=report, fm=function module (group required).

tools.aiDescription: Read ABAP source via ADT REST. objectType "program" reads a report/program; "fm" reads a function module (group required). Read-only (mcp_readonly allowed for DEV/QAS).

summary.ja: ABAP レポート/プログラム作成・更新＋活性化

overview.ja: ABAP レポート/プログラムを作成・更新し既定で活性化。フル mcp + DEV ロール接続 + カスタム名(Z*/Y*) 必須。
overview.en: Create/update an ABAP program and activate; requires full mcp, DEV-role Destination, custom name (Z*/Y*).

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ ADT REST（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Create or update an ABAP report/program and (by default) activate it, via ADT REST. Writes require the full mcp scope, a DEV-role Destination, and a custom name (Z*/Y* or /NS/*). Pass the full source as a plain string. Returns activation messages (syntax/activation errors) so they can be fixed and re-submitted.

summary.ja: ABAP プログラム/CDS DDL 削除

overview.ja: ABAP プログラム(program) または CDS DDL ソース/ビュー(ddls)を削除。未活性のみの CDS も削除可。
overview.en: Delete an ABAP program or CDS DDL source/view; works even for inactive-only CDS.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ ADT REST（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Delete an ABAP report/program (objectType=program, default) or a CDS DDL source / view (objectType=ddls) via ADT REST. CDS deletion works even for inactive-only (never-activated) views. Full mcp scope + DEV-role Destination + custom name (Z*/Y* or /NS/*) required.

summary.ja: ABAP Function Module(SE37)作成・更新＋活性化

overview.ja: ABAP Function Module(SE37)を作成・更新し既定で活性化。関数グループは自動作成。
overview.en: Create/update an ABAP function module (SE37) and activate; function group auto-created.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ ADT REST（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Create or update an ABAP function module (SE37) and (by default) activate it, via ADT REST. The function group is auto-created if absent. Pass the source as FUNCTION <name>. ... ENDFUNCTION. WITHOUT the *"-interface comment block (ADT rejects parameter comment blocks on source PUT; parameters are managed as object metadata — currently only parameterless/body-only modules are supported). Full mcp scope + DEV-role Destination + custom names (Z*/Y* or /NS/*) required.

summary.ja: 移送リクエスト作成

overview.ja: 移送リクエストを作成(TR_INSERT_REQUEST_WITH_TASKS)。返る trkorr を write/delete に渡す。
overview.en: Create a transport request (TR_INSERT_REQUEST_WITH_TASKS); pass the returned trkorr to write/delete tools.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ backend REST handler（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Create a transport request (TR_INSERT_REQUEST_WITH_TASKS). Returns the new transport number (trkorr) to pass to write/delete tools for transportable objects. Full mcp scope + DEV-role Destination required.

summary.ja: 移送リクエスト解放

overview.ja: 移送リクエストを解放(TR_RELEASE_REQUEST, headless)。simulation=true で確認のみ。解放でターゲットへエクスポート。
overview.en: Release a transport request (TR_RELEASE_REQUEST); simulation=true to check only; release exports toward target.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ backend REST handler（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Release a transport request (TR_RELEASE_REQUEST, headless). Use simulation=true to check without releasing. Releasing exports the request toward its target system. Full mcp scope + DEV-role Destination required.

summary.ja: ABAP オブジェクト活性化＋構文チェック

overview.ja: ADT REST で ABAP オブジェクトを活性化し、活性化/構文メッセージを返す。
overview.en: Activate an ABAP object via ADT REST and return activation/syntax messages.

tools.auth: ABAP Destination（DEV ロール）＋ ADT REST（full mcp 必須）
tools.aiDescription: Activate an ABAP object via ADT REST and return activation/syntax messages. Full mcp scope + DEV-role Destination required.

summary.ja: IAS(Cloud Identity)Admin API。個人情報を扱う

overview.ja: IAS(Cloud Identity Services)Admin API。SCIM Users/Groups/Applications/Schemas/Tenant Settings 等。個人情報を扱う。
overview.en: IAS Admin API: SCIM Users/Groups/Applications/Schemas/Tenant Settings, etc. Handles personal data.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) Admin API. SCIM Users / Groups / Applications / Schemas / Tenant Setting, etc. Specify a registered IAS Destination name.

summary.ja: IPS(Identity Provisioning)Jobs/JobLogs API。個人情報を扱う

overview.ja: IPS(Identity Provisioning Service)の Jobs/JobLogs API。IAS Destination を再利用。公開 API は Jobs/JobLogs のみ。
overview.en: IPS Jobs/JobLogs API; reuses the IAS Destination. Public API exposes only Jobs and JobLogs.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS) Jobs / JobLogs API. Reuses the IAS Destination (same tenant, /service/scim/Jobs family). The public API exposes only the Jobs and JobLogs resources.

summary.ja: Cloud Foundry API v3

overview.ja: Cloud Foundry API v3。apps/orgs/spaces/service_instances/service_bindings/scale/restart 等。
overview.en: Cloud Foundry API v3: apps/orgs/spaces/service_instances/service_bindings/scale/restart, etc.

tools.aiDescription: Call the Cloud Foundry API v3. apps / orgs / spaces / service_instances / service_bindings / scale / restart, etc. Specify a registered CF API Destination name (OAuth2Password + cf client).

summary.ja: Build Work Zone Standard Content API

overview.ja: Build Work Zone Standard の Content API。tiles/groups/roles/pages/content_packages の取得・アップロード・公開・削除。
overview.en: Build Work Zone Standard Content API: get/upload/publish/delete tiles/groups/roles/pages/content_packages.

tools.aiDescription: Call the Build Work Zone Standard Content API. Get/upload/publish/delete tiles / groups / roles / pages / content_packages. Specify a registered BWZ Content API Destination name (OAuth2ClientCredentials).

summary.ja: Cloud Transport Management v2 API

overview.ja: SAP Cloud Transport Management v2 API。nodes 一覧 / transportRequests 一覧 / import / queues。
overview.en: SAP Cloud Transport Management v2 API: list nodes / transportRequests / import / queues.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Cloud Transport Management v2 API. List nodes / list transportRequests / import / queues. Specify a registered cTMS Destination name. Quirks: listing requires nodeId (numeric) + status + top/skip; import uses a plural transportRequests:[<id>] body.

summary.ja: Forms Service by Adobe REST API
summary.en: Forms Service by Adobe REST API

overview.ja: SAP Forms Service by Adobe の REST API。帳票生成・ADS 操作・テンプレート登録。詳細は /v3/api-docs(OpenAPI 3.1)。
overview.en: SAP Forms Service by Adobe REST API: form generation, ADS operations, template registration (/v3/api-docs).

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Forms Service by Adobe REST API. Form generation, ADS operations, template registration. Specify a registered ADS Destination name (details available via OpenAPI 3.1 at /v3/api-docs).

summary.ja: Cloud Information Service(CIS Central)

overview.ja: SAP Cloud Information Service(CIS Central)。Global Account/Subaccount/Service Plan/Entitlement 等を参照。
overview.en: SAP Cloud Information Service (CIS Central): read Global Account/Subaccount/Service Plan/Entitlement, etc.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Cloud Information Service (CIS Central). Read Global Account / Subaccount / Service Plan / Entitlement, etc. Specify a registered CIS-Central Destination name (OAuth2ClientCredentials + GA Viewer/Admin role required).

summary.ja: Integration Suite(CPI)Audit/Monitoring API

overview.ja: SAP Integration Suite(CPI)の Audit/Monitoring API。iFlow/Channel/Logs/MessageProcessingLogs 等。
overview.en: SAP Integration Suite (CPI) Audit/Monitoring API: iFlow/Channel/Logs/MessageProcessingLogs, etc.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Integration Suite (CPI) Audit / Monitoring API. iFlow / Channel / Logs / MessageProcessingLogs, etc. Specify a registered CPI Audit Destination name.

summary.ja: Alert Notification Service REST API

overview.ja: SAP Alert Notification Service REST API(全 API CRUD)。Configuration(condition/action/subscription)・Producer・Consumer。
overview.en: SAP Alert Notification Service REST API (full CRUD): Configuration (condition/action/subscription), Producer, Consumer.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Alert Notification Service REST API (full CRUD across all APIs). Configuration Management API: /cf/configuration/v1/condition | /action | /subscription (GET list / GET by name / POST / PUT / DELETE). Consumer API: /cf/consumer/v1/matched-events | /undelivered-events (GET). Producer API: /cf/producer/v1/resource-events (POST). Specify a registered ANS Destination name (OAuth2ClientCredentials).

summary.ja: Build Process Automation REST API

overview.ja: SAP Build Process Automation REST API。Workflow API(workflow-definitions/task-definitions/workflow-instances/task-instances)。
overview.en: SAP Build Process Automation REST API: Workflow API (workflow-definitions/task-definitions/workflow-instances/task-instances).

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Build Process Automation REST API. Workflow API: /workflow/rest/v1/workflow-definitions | task-definitions | workflow-instances | task-instances (GET; POST/PUT/DELETE to operate). Specify a registered SBPA Destination name (OAuth2ClientCredentials).

summary.ja: Datasphere 公開 REST/OData API

overview.ja: SAP Datasphere 公開 REST/OData API(Technical User)。SAC 経由 API はヘッダ x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true が必要。
overview.en: SAP Datasphere public REST/OData API (Technical User). SAC-routed APIs require header x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Datasphere public REST / OData API with a Technical User OAuth2ClientCredentials Destination. IMPORTANT: SAC-routed APIs require the header x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true (without it the tenant returns the SPA HTML page). Verified TUP-accessible (2026-06-28): Catalog OData V4 GET /api/v1/dwc/catalog/spaces | /assets | /spaces('<name>'); Connections GET /api/v1/datasphere/spaces/{space}/connections; Certificates GET /api/v1/datasphere/configuration/security/certificates; SCIM 2.0 GET /api/v1/scim2/Users | /Groups; Audit export GET /api/v1/audit/activities/exportActivities?startTime&endTime (Accept: application/octet-stream, CSV); Tasks run/monitor POST /api/v1/datasphere/tasks/chains/{space}/run|retry/{objectid}, POST .../cancel/{logid}, GET /api/v1/datasphere/tasks/logs/{space}/objects/{objectid}; Data Sharing Cockpit GET /api/v1/datasphere/marketplace/dsc/providers. NOTE: the internal /dwaas-core/api/v1/* admin APIs are FORBIDDEN for Technical User clients (403 forbiddenOperationForTupOAuthClient) — use the /api/v1/datasphere|dwc|scim2 public APIs above. Distinct from sap_call_datasphere_cli (datasphere CLI; data commands need interactive 3-legged auth).

summary.ja: Cloud ALM REST API

overview.ja: SAP Cloud ALM REST API。Projects/Tasks/Analytics/Landscape/Cases、BSM Status Events(read) と Event Situations(close/update) 等。スコープは service-instance の authorities で付与。
overview.en: SAP Cloud ALM REST API: Projects/Tasks/Analytics/Landscape/Cases, BSM Status Events (read), Event Situations (close/update). Scopes granted via service-instance authorities.

tools.aiDescription: Call the SAP Cloud ALM REST API (Landscape / Analytics / Tasks / Projects / Cases / Events etc.). Base host https://<region>.alm.cloud.sap/api. Verified TUP-accessible (2026-06-30): Projects GET /api/calm-projects/v1/projects; Tasks GET /api/calm-tasks/v1/tasks?projectId=<uuid> (projectId required); Landscape /api/calm-landscape/v1/* (e.g. businessServices); Analytics /api/calm-analytics/v1/*. NOTE: API scopes are granted at service-instance creation/update time via xs-security.authorities ($XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.<area>.read/write), NOT at key creation; a route returns 403/404 when the instance lacks that scope. The generic GW 404 body is {"message":"Not Found","status":404}. Specify a registered Cloud ALM Destination name (OAuth2ClientCredentials, e.g. SIC_CALM).

summary.ja: btp CLI 実行

overview.ja: SAP btp CLI を実行。account/security/services 等の CRUD。args に CLI 引数配列を渡す。
overview.en: Run the SAP btp CLI (account/security/services CRUD); pass CLI args as an array.

tools.aiDescription: Run the SAP btp CLI. See the SAP public reference for available commands (help.sap.com "Account Administration Using the btp CLI" / `btp help`). Pass CLI arguments as an array in args (e.g. ["assign","security/role-collection","<RC>","--to-group","<group>","--of-idp","sap.custom","--subaccount","<guid>"]). No login needed (handled by the connection). Specify a registered btp CLI Destination name (BasicAuthentication).

summary.ja: Cloud Foundry CLI 実行

overview.ja: Cloud Foundry CLI を実行。api/auth は接続側で処理。args に CLI 引数配列を渡す。
overview.en: Run the Cloud Foundry CLI; api/auth handled by the connection; pass CLI args as an array.

tools.aiDescription: Run the Cloud Foundry CLI. See the SAP/CF public reference for available commands (cli.cloudfoundry.org / `cf help`). Pass CLI arguments as an array in args. api/auth are handled by the connection. Specify a registered cf CLI Destination name.

summary.ja: Datasphere CLI 実行

overview.ja: SAP Datasphere CLI を実行。ログインは接続側で処理。args に CLI 引数配列を渡す。
overview.en: Run the SAP Datasphere CLI; login handled by the connection; pass CLI args as an array.

tools.aiDescription: Run the SAP Datasphere CLI. See the SAP public reference for available commands (`datasphere help`). Pass CLI arguments as an array in args. Login is handled by the connection. Specify a registered Datasphere CLI Destination name. Note: commands that require individual user permissions (user_scopes/authorization_code) are not supported in headless mode.
